title: Quantum Computing Just Hit the Stock Market at $14 Billion
script: Quantum computing has been '10 years away' for 30 years. Today it's an IPO. Quantinuum — Honeywell's quantum spinoff — priced its Nasdaq debut this morning at $55 a share: a $14.3 billion valuation. The company lost $192 million last year on just $31 million in revenue. Investors don't care. Demand was oversubscribed by double digits. The quantum era just became a stock you can buy.
